title: Identify and value vehicle salvage
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and value vehicle salvage demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Work instructions are used to determine job requirements1.2 Vehicle to be inspected is located1.3 Workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, and component specifications are read and interpreted1.4 Workplace requirements, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices and policies are identified1.5 Safety equipment and tooling equipment are selected and checked1.6 Vehicle inspection methods are determined to minimise waste material and components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work instructions are used to determine job requirements1.2 Vehicle to be inspected is located1.3 Workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, and component specifications are read and interpreted1.4 Workplace requirements, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices and policies are identified1.5 Safety equipment and tooling equipment are selected and checked1.6 Vehicle inspection methods are determined to minimise waste material and components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work instructions are used to determine job requirements1.2 Vehicle to be inspected is located1.3 Workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, and component specifications are read and interpreted1.4 Workplace requirements, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices and policies are identified1.5 Safety equipment and tooling equipment are selected and checked1.6 Vehicle inspection methods are determined to minimise waste material and components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Inspect vehicle to identify saleable systems and components

pcs.text: Vehicle systems and components are dismantled and inspected without causing damage2.2 Serviceable vehicle systems and components are identified2.3 Saleable vehicle salvage, or vehicle systems and components, are determined and documented following legal requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Vehicle systems and components are dismantled and inspected without causing damage2.2 Serviceable vehicle systems and components are identified2.3 Saleable vehicle salvage, or vehicle systems and components, are determined and documented following legal requirements?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect vehicle to identify saleable systems and components

elements.title: Determine vehicle and component retail price

pcs.text: Value of identified saleable salvage, or vehicle systems and components is determined3.2 Category of vehicle salvage is determined3.3 Retail price of each saleable system and component is estimated3.4 Details of total loss vehicle are reported to the relevant statutory body according to workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Value of identified saleable salvage, or vehicle systems and components is determined3.2 Category of vehicle salvage is determined3.3 Retail price of each saleable system and component is estimated3.4 Details of total loss vehicle are reported to the relevant statutory body according to workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Value of identified saleable salvage, or vehicle systems and components is determined3.2 Category of vehicle salvage is determined3.3 Retail price of each saleable system and component is estimated3.4 Details of total loss vehicle are reported to the relevant statutory body according to workplace policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine vehicle and component retail price

elements.title: Clean up work area

pcs.text: Reusable material is collected and stored4.2 Waste and scrap are removed according to workplace policies and procedures4.3 Equipment and work area are cleaned and inspected to serviceable condition according to workplace procedures4.4 Faults in unsaleable equipment are determined and tagged according to workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reusable material is collected and stored4.2 Waste and scrap are removed according to workplace policies and procedures4.3 Equipment and work area are cleaned and inspected to serviceable condition according to workplace procedures4.4 Faults in unsaleable equipment are determined and tagged according to workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reusable material is collected and stored4.2 Waste and scrap are removed according to workplace policies and procedures4.3 Equipment and work area are cleaned and inspected to serviceable condition according to workplace procedures4.4 Faults in unsaleable equipment are determined and tagged according to workplace policies and procedures.
